overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire exploring a rocky cliffside beside a waterfall, then walking through arid vegetation to reach a horse-drawn carriage, mounting it, and driving along a scenic cliffside trail with expansive canyon views.

events.description: character walks away from waterfall area into more open hillside terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path cut into the cliffside next to a roaring waterfall

entered.detail: large powerful waterfall cascading down the rock face with mist at the base
tall reddish-brown rock wall with rough texture towering over the path
narrow winding trail along the cliff edge with loose rocks

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a narrow cliffside path beside a powerful waterfall. The camera follows from behind as the character walks forward along the dirt trail, with a tall rock wall on the left and the waterfall cascading on the right. Around the 10-second mark, the character moves away from the waterfall into a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded hillside trail with distant river views

events.description: horse-drawn carriage comes into view ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through scattered trees and dry grass toward a stationary horse-drawn carriage

notable_agents.action: horse standing still, harnessed to a wooden carriage, waiting on the path

entered.detail: green leafy trees and shrubs dotting the hillside
wide river visible in the valley below with hazy distant shores
wooden two-wheeled carriage with a single horse harnessed, parked on the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the waterfall through a more open hillside area with scattered trees. The terrain slopes upward, revealing a panoramic view of a distant river valley. Ahead on the path, a horse-drawn carriage becomes visible, standing stationary among the vegetation.

events.description: character stops walking and mounts the horse-drawn carriage
carriage begins moving forward along the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching the stationary carriage, climbing aboard, taking the reins, and beginning to drive the horse

notable_agents.action: horse standing harnessed to carriage, then beginning to walk forward as the carriage moves

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the parked carriage, climbs aboard, and takes control. The camera shifts to a position behind the carriage as it begins to move forward along the dirt trail, transitioning from walking to driving.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside carriage road with panoramic canyon views

events.description: passing another rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: driving the horse-drawn carriage along a winding cliffside path with expansive views of the river canyon below

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction along the trail, passing the carriage

entered.detail: tall reddish rock formation rising beside the path
expansive vista of layered rock formations and the river winding through the canyon
solitary figure on horseback visible ahead on the trail

segments.scene_description: The character drives the carriage along a scenic cliffside trail with the canyon and river visible to the left. The path winds along the edge of a tall cliff face on the right. Around the 50-second mark, the carriage passes another rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction, continuing along the dirt road through increasingly open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, misty cliffside path into an expansive journey across a high canyon plateau. It begins behind a character walking along a dirt trail squeezed between a towering rock wall and a powerful cascading waterfall. As the character moves away from the falls, the terrain opens into a sloping hillside with scattered trees, gradually revealing a panoramic view of a distant river valley and a stationary horse-drawn carriage. The camera then follows the character as they climb aboard and take control, shifting its perspective to trail behind the carriage as it begins to roll forward. Finally, the scene expands into a wide scenic drive along a winding cliffside road, passing another rider on horseback while the landscape opens up to reveal deep canyons and a river below.
